title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: A tutorial on Infrastructure as Code using AWS CDK with Python to build a serverless REST API. The video contrasts manual AWS console configuration with declarative infrastructure code, covering DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway deployment.
